allow: Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('./src/test-problems.js'\).then\(m => { console.log\('count:', m.PROBLEMS.length\); const cc = {}; for \(const p of m.PROBLEMS\) for \(const c of p.concepts\) cc[c] = \(cc[c]||0\)+1; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(cc\)\); for \(const p of m.PROBLEMS\) { try { p.expected\(p.aDefault\); p.expected\(p.aMin\); p.expected\(p.aMax\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('id', p.id, e.message\); } } console.log\('OK'\); }\);")

Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import\('node:sqlite'\).then\(\({DatabaseSync}\) => { const db = new DatabaseSync\('backend/data/app.db'\); const cols = db.prepare\('PRAGMA table_info\(lectures\)'\).all\(\); console.log\('lectures:', cols.map\(c => c.name\)\); const sc = db.prepare\('PRAGMA table_info\(surveys\)'\).all\(\); console.log\('surveys:', sc.map\(c => c.name + ':' + c.type\)\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "import\('./src/db.js'\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('db loaded ok'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
